examples: She doesn't have the ruthlessness required to succeed in business.
In The Prince, he championed cunning, ruthlessness, and boldness, rather than virtue, mercy and justice, as the skills of successful leaders.
The word suggests both ruthlessness and weakness.
His ruthlessness was fun to watch, and it was easy to cheer for him.
Even so, it's not the ruthlessness that distinguishes Lucas from every other Scarface on the block.
